visa_types.name: Visa for Language Courses in Germany (more than 3 months)
visa_types.documents_required:
Please prepare the necessary documentation for your visa application using the checklists given on link website of the visa section Nigeria. Federal Foreign Office (https://nigeria.diplo.de/ng-en/2752650-2752650)
There you will find all relevant information like requested documents checklist, duration of the application process, fees, where to apply, etc.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[deu > nga > en > Table:Visa for students > Visa Fees 1]
*Please note that the service fee is inclusive of all applicable taxes.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Nigeria Naira (NGN) is as per current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- The applicants who submit their applications at the Visa Application Centre can pay the visa fee through credit / debit card.
- Applicants exempted from visa fee need to pay only Service Charge.
visa_types.processing_time: Note: The processing time for the assessment of a National D visa varies depending on the nationality of the applicant and the time of year in which the application is given.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Visa Applications for a long term language course (More than 90 days) – Important Information
All official and legally binding information regarding visa requirements for long term stays for a language course, procedures, and regulations is published exclusively on the website of the German Consulate General in Lagos. Applicants are strongly advised to carefully read the information provided there before registering for an appointment.
Appointment Allocation
Appointments for language course visas are allocated strictly according to the date of registration on the Consulate’s online appointment booking system.
The external service provider does not schedule appointments independently and cannot influence waiting times or prioritization.
Once it is the applicant’s turn, VFS will contact the applicant directly with further instructions regarding the appointment date and submission procedure.
Required Documents
A detailed list of the documents required for submission at VFS can be found under “Documents Required.”
Applicants must ensure that their documentation is complete at the time of submission. Incomplete applications may lead to rejection.
Role of VFS
VFS Global is responsible solely for the administrative intake of applications, including:
- Collection of application forms and supporting documents
- Collection of applicable fees
- Recording of biometric data (where required)
- Forwarding the complete application to the Consulate
VFS Global does not assess applications, provide binding advice on visa decisions, or influence processing times.
Processing and Decision
All applications are processed and decided exclusively by the German Consulate General Lagos.
The Consulate alone is responsible for reviewing the application, requesting additional documents if necessary, and making the final decision.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Visa Applications for a long term language course (More than 90 days) – Important Information
All official and legally binding information regarding visa requirements for long term stays for a language course, procedures, and regulations is published exclusively on the website of the German Consulate General in Lagos. Applicants are strongly advised to carefully read the information provided there before registering for an appointment.
Appointment Allocation
Appointments for language course visas are allocated strictly according to the date of registration on the Consulate’s online appointment booking system.
The external service provider does not schedule appointments independently and cannot influence waiting times or prioritization.
Once it is the applicant’s turn, VFS will contact the applicant directly with further instructions regarding the appointment date and submission procedure.
Required Documents
A detailed list of the documents required for submission at VFS can be found under “Documents Required.”
Applicants must ensure that their documentation is complete at the time of submission. Incomplete applications may lead to rejection.
Role of VFS
VFS Global is responsible solely for the administrative intake of applications, including:
- Collection of application forms and supporting documents
- Collection of applicable fees
- Recording of biometric data (where required)
- Forwarding the complete application to the Consulate
VFS Global does not assess applications, provide binding advice on visa decisions, or influence processing times.
Processing and Decision
All applications are processed and decided exclusively by the German Consulate General Lagos.
The Consulate alone is responsible for reviewing the application, requesting additional documents if necessary, and making the final decision.

## Visa Fees

[deu > nga > en > Table:Visa for students > Visa Fees 1]
*Please note that the service fee is inclusive of all applicable taxes.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Nigeria Naira (NGN) is as per current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- The applicants who submit their applications at the Visa Application Centre can pay the visa fee through credit / debit card.
- Applicants exempted from visa fee need to pay only Service Charge.

## Documents Required
Please prepare the necessary documentation for your visa application using the checklists given on link website of the visa section Nigeria. Federal Foreign Office (https://nigeria.diplo.de/ng-en/2752650-2752650)
There you will find all relevant information like requested documents checklist, duration of the application process, fees, where to apply, etc.

## Photo Specifications
Two recent passport size photos for each person included in the application with 35x45 MM white background for Germany Visa as well as for National Visa and face coverage up to 70 - 80% and photo not to be older then 6 months.
Download here

## Processing Time
Note: The processing time for the assessment of a National D visa varies depending on the nationality of the applicant and the time of year in which the application is given.

## Online Application Forms
Click here (https://videx.diplo.de/videx/visum-erfassung/#/videx-langfristiger-aufenthalt) to fill the online national visa application form (To be filled online - mandatory)
